calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-25-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:50am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Respondent Alvin Daryl Draper appears in Pro Per; Anthony Agpaoa, Esq. appears for appellant Kevin Lam. Alvin Darly Draper, Sr. appears. Parties and witnesses are sworn.
Mr. Draper presents his case in the narrative
EXHA 2 diagrams and 6 color photos
EXHB 2 pages of estimates
9:58am
Mr. Agpaoa cross examins Mr. Draper, then questions Mr. Lam
10:09am
Judge Myles questions Mr. Lam.
Mr. Draper Sr. testifies in the narrative. Mr. Agpaoa will be requested to provid Judge Myles with a copy of the "Way Bill" of the taxi cab he was driving. He is to FAX the copy to Judge Myles.
10:17am
Matter is submitted.
